title: Faithful(ish) Katanas
description: Nice, simple, and faithful(ish) katanas to replace boring swords.
body:
Quick disclaimer*
  The gallery images are VERY low quality, so if you wanna know EXACTLY what they look like, you'll have to test out the pack.
  
  
  Faithful(ish) Katanas replaces boring old swords with sick-looking katanas! Since wooden and stone katanas look weird, they are also blunt training swords for stone and wood. 


  The katanas are sheathed when unequipped. If you pair this pack with [YDM's Weapon Master](https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponmaster) by YDM, it looks really cool in third person! If you want to see it in first person, too, use [First-person model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) by tr7zw.
